description: Wave 1 - M06 Output and Alarm: Implement actuation service for warning lights, sirens, and stop request commands via Modbus DO. Branch: feat/m06-output-alarm. This is R3 safety-critical.
steps: Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/actuation/types.go with CommandType (WARNING_LIGHT, SIREN, STOP_REQUEST_PULSE, AUDIO_ANNOUNCEMENT), CommandResult, ActuationCommand struct with commandId, correlationId, timeout
Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/actuation/service.go implementing ActuationService: ExecuteCommand, CheckFeedback, GetPendingCommands
Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/actuation/service_test.go testing: command execution, timeout handling, duplicate prevention, feedback verification
Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/actuation/dedup.go preventing duplicate output commands for same event within suppression window
Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/actuation/replay_guard.go ensuring no past commands are replayed after restart
Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/actuation/replay_guard_test.go testing that boot does not replay old pulse commands
Create services/gateway-server/internal/adapters/io/output/output.go implementing DO command execution via IOAdapter
Ensure stop requests go to PLC/Safety Relay only (never direct machine power)
Ensure command has ID, correlation ID, timeout, and result tracking
Ensure retry is limited (no infinite retry on missing ACK)
Ensure restart does not replay past pulse commands
Document R3 classification and safety constraints in code
Run make build and make test
acceptance_criteria: ActuationService executes warning light, siren, and stop request commands
Each command has unique ID, correlation ID, timeout, and tracked result
Duplicate output suppression prevents same event from triggering multiple pulses
Restart does not replay past commands (replay guard test passes)
No direct machine power switching logic (output goes to PLC/Safety Relay input)
